en.summary: In this lengthy wasiyya (will), the Prophet Muhammad (s) advises Imam Ali (as) on a wide range of personal and ethical matters.

key_terms.الوصية: Wasiyya - the testamentary will and advice
key_terms.السواك: Siwak - the tooth-cleaning stick from the arak tree
key_terms.آية الكرسي: Ayat al-Kursi - the Verse of the Throne (Quran 2:255)

en.seo_question: What advice did the Prophet Muhammad give to Imam Ali in his wasiyya regarding marriage and ethics?

translations.en: Abu Ja'far Muhammad b. 'Ali b. al-Husayn b. Musa b. Babawayh al-Qummi (may Allah be pleased with him) narrated to us. He said: Muhammad b. Ibrahim b. Ishaq (may Allah be pleased with him) narrated to us. He said: Abu Sa'id al-Hasan b. 'Ali al-'Adawi narrated to us. He said: Yusuf b. Yahya al-Isfahani Abu Ya'qub narrated to us. He said: Abu 'Ali Isma'il b. Hatim narrated to me. He said: Abu Ja'far Ahmad b. Salih b. Sa'id al-Makki narrated to us. He said: 'Amr b. Hafs narrated to us from Ishaq b. Najih from Khusayf from Mujahid from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri. He said: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him and his family) gave a wasiyya (will) to Ali b. Abi Talib (peace be upon him) and said:
translations.ur: ابو جعفر محمد بن علی بن حسین بن موسیٰ بن بابویہ قمی نے هم سے بیان کیا۔ رسول الله نے علی بن ابی طالب کو وصیت فرمائی:
translations.tr: Ebu Ca'fer Muhammed b. Ali b. Huseyin b. Musa b. Babuveyh el-Kummi bize rivayet etti. Resulullah Ali b. Ebi Talib'e vasiyet etti ve dedi ki:
translations.fa: ابوجعفر محمد بن علی بن حسین بن موسی بن بابویه قمی برای ما نقل کرد. رسول خدا به علی بن ابیطالب وصیت کرد و فرمود:
translations.id: Abu Ja'far Muhammad bin Ali bin al-Husain bin Musa bin Babawayh al-Qummi menceritakan kepada kami. Rasulullah berwasiat kepada Ali bin Abi Thalib dan bersabda:
translations.bn: আবু জাফর মুহাম্মাদ বিন আলী বিন হুসাইন আমাদের কাছে বর্ণনা করেছেন। রাসূলুল্লাহ আলী বিন আবী তালিবকে ওয়সিয়ত করেছেন:
translations.es: Abu Ya'far Muhammad b. 'Ali b. al-Husayn nos narró. El Mensajero de Allah hizo su testamento a Ali b. Abi Talib y dijo:
translations.fr: Abu Ja'far Muhammad b. 'Ali b. al-Husayn nous a rapporté. Le Messager d'Allah fit son testament à Ali b. Abi Talib et dit:
translations.de: Abu Dscha'far Muhammad b. 'Ali b. al-Husayn berichtete uns. Der Gesandte Allahs machte sein Vermächtnis an Ali b. Abi Talib und sagte:
translations.ru: Абу Джа'фар Мухаммад б. 'Али рассказал нам. Посланник Аллаха завещал Али б. Аби Талибу:
translations.zh: 阿布·贾法尔·穆罕默德向我们传述。真主的使者向阿里·本·阿比·塔利卜立遗嘱说：

translations.en: O Ali! When the bride is brought to your house, remove her shoes when she sits and wash her feet, then pour the water at the farthest edge of your dwelling, for if you do so, Allah will remove seventy thousand types of poverty from your house and send down seventy thousand types of blessing and bestow seventy thousand mercies upon the bride. O Ali! Beware of intercourse on the first, the middle, and the last of the month, for verily insanity, leprosy, and mental decline come upon the child. O Ali! Do not speak during intercourse, for if a child is conceived, it may be mute. Let none of you look at the private parts of his wife, and lower your gazes. O Ali! Do not have intercourse with your wife while desiring another woman, for I fear that if a child is destined, it would be an effeminate man or a masculine woman.
translations.ur: اے علی! جب دلهن تمہارے گھر لائی جائے تو اس کے جوتے اتارو اور اس کے پیر دھوؤ۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Gelin evine getirildiğinde ayakkabılarını çıkar ve ayaklarını yıka.
translations.fa: ای علی! وقتی عروس به خانه‌ات آورده شد کفشهایش را درآور و پایش را بشوی.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Ketika pengantin dibawa ke rumahmu, lepaskan sepatunya dan cuci kakinya.
translations.bn: হে আলী! যখন কনে তোমার ঘরে আনা হয় তখন তার জুতা খোল এবং তার পা ধোও।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! Cuando la novia sea llevada a tu casa, quítale los zapatos y lávale los pies.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! Lorsque la mariée est amenée chez toi, retire ses chaussures et lave ses pieds.
translations.de: O Ali! Wenn die Braut in dein Haus gebracht wird, ziehe ihre Schuhe aus und wasche ihre Füße.
translations.ru: О Али! Когда невесту приведут в твой дом, сними её обувь и вымой ей ноги.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！当新娘被带到你家时，脱下她的鞋子并洗她的脚。

translations.en: O Ali! Do not have intercourse with your wife in the state of menstruation, for if a child is destined, it will be leprous. O Ali! Do not have intercourse with your wife after the midday prayer, for if a child is destined, it will be cross-eyed. O Ali! Do not speak during intercourse and do not be hasty. O Ali! Do not have intercourse with your wife under a fruit tree, for the child may be an executioner. O Ali! Do not have intercourse on the rooftop, for if a child is destined, it will be a hypocrite. O Ali! If your wife is pregnant, do not have intercourse without ablution. O Ali! Do not have intercourse with your wife on the night of Eid al-Fitr, for the child may be evil. O Ali! Do not have intercourse on the night of Eid al-Adha. O Ali! Do not have intercourse under the open sky.
translations.ur: اے علی! حیض کی حالت میں اپنی بیوی سے مباشرت نہ کرو۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Hayiz halindeyken hanımınla birlikte olma.
translations.fa: ای علی! در حالت حیض با همسرت نزدیکی نکن.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Jangan berhubungan dengan istrimu dalam keadaan haidh.
translations.bn: হে আলী! হায়েয় অবস্থায় তোমার স্ত্রীর সাথে সহবাস করো না।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! No tengas relaciones con tu esposa durante la menstruación.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! N'aie pas de rapports avec ton épouse pendant les menstrues.
translations.de: O Ali! Habe keinen Geschlechtsverkehr mit deiner Frau während der Menstruation.
translations.ru: О Али! Не вступай в интимную связь с женой во время менструации.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！不要在月经期间与你的妻子同房。

translations.en: O Ali! Do not have intercourse facing the qibla. O Ali! Do not have intercourse in a boat. O Ali! Do not sit at the table of people who drink wine. O Ali! Do not enter the bathhouse without an izar. O Ali! Do not wear a ring of brass. O Ali! Do not perform ablution in a place where you have bathed from impurity. O Ali! Do not borrow from your neighbor's cooking pot unless you know its contents. O Ali! Do not refuse perfume, for it is light to carry and pleasant in scent. O Ali! Make sure to use the siwak, for the siwak purifies the mouth and pleases the Lord.
translations.ur: اے علی! قبلے کی طرف رخ کر کے مباشرت نہ کرو۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Kıbleye doğru birlikte olma. Ey Ali! Misvak kullanmaya devam et.
translations.fa: ای علی! رو به قبله نزدیکی نکن. ای علی! بر مسواک مداومت کن.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Jangan berhubungan menghadap kiblat. Wahai Ali! Biasakan menggunakan siwak.
translations.bn: হে আলী! কিবলার দিকে মুখ করে সহবাস করো না। হে আলী! মিসওয়াক ব্যবহার করো।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! No tengas relaciones mirando hacia la qibla. ¡Oh Ali! Usa el siwak regularmente.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! N'aie pas de rapports face à la qibla. Ô Ali ! Utilise le siwak régulièrement.
translations.de: O Ali! Habe keinen Geschlechtsverkehr mit Blick zur Qibla. O Ali! Benutze den Siwak regelmäßig.
translations.ru: О Али! Не вступай в связь лицом к кибле. О Али! Используй сивак.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！不要面朝朝拜方向同房。阿里啊！坚持使用刷牙棍。

translations.en: O Ali! Recite Ayat al-Kursi at the time of every prayer, for you will be under the protection of Allah. O Ali! Recite Surah Yasin, for it contains ten blessings. O Ali! Beware of lying, for lying darkens the face. O Ali! Do not envy, for envy consumes good deeds as fire consumes wood. O Ali! Beware of anger, for the beginning of anger is madness and its end is regret. O Ali! Beware of excessive eating, for it hardens the heart. O Ali! Give charity in the early morning, for calamity does not pass charity. O Ali! Preserve this wasiyya of mine as I preserved it from Jibril.
translations.ur: اے علی! آیة الکرسی پڑھو۔ اے علی! جھوٹ سے بچو۔ اے علی! حسد نہ کرو۔ اے علی! غصے سے بچو۔ اے علی! میری وصیت یاد رکھو۔
translations.tr: Ey Ali! Ayetel Kürsi'yi her namaz vaktinde oku. Ey Ali! Yalandan sakın. Ey Ali! Hasetten sakın. Ey Ali! Öfkeden sakın. Ey Ali! Vasiyetimi muhafaza et.
translations.fa: ای علی! آیة الکرسی را بخوان. ای علی! از دروغ بپرهیز. ای علی! حسد نورز. ای علی! از غضب بپرهیز. ای علی! وصیت مرا حفظ کن.
translations.id: Wahai Ali! Bacalah Ayat Kursi setiap waktu shalat. Wahai Ali! Waspadalah terhadap dusta. Wahai Ali! Jangan hasad. Wahai Ali! Waspadalah terhadap amarah. Wahai Ali! Jagalah wasiatku ini.
translations.bn: হে আলী! আয়াতুল কুরসী পড়। হে আলী! মিথ্যা থেকে সাবধান। হে আলী! হিংসা করো না। হে আলী! আমার ওয়সিয়ত রক্ষা কর।
translations.es: ¡Oh Ali! Recita Ayat al-Kursi en cada oración. ¡Oh Ali! Cuídate de la mentira. ¡Oh Ali! No envidies. ¡Oh Ali! Cuídate de la ira. ¡Oh Ali! Preserva mi testamento.
translations.fr: Ô Ali ! Récite le Verset du Trône à chaque prière. Ô Ali ! Méfie-toi du mensonge. Ô Ali ! Ne sois pas envieux. Ô Ali ! Méfie-toi de la colère. Ô Ali ! Préserve mon testament.
translations.de: O Ali! Rezitiere den Thronvers bei jedem Gebet. O Ali! Hüte dich vor der Lüge. O Ali! Neide nicht. O Ali! Hüte dich vor dem Zorn. O Ali! Bewahre mein Vermächtnis.
translations.ru: О Али! Читай Аят аль-Курси при каждой молитве. О Али! Остерегайся лжи. О Али! Не завидуй. О Али! Остерегайся гнева. О Али! Сохрани моё завещание.
translations.zh: 阿里啊！每次礼拜时读宝座经文。阿里啊！警惕谎言。阿里啊！不要嫉妒。阿里啊！警惕愤怒。阿里啊！保守我的遗嘱。

narrators.name_ar: محمد بن علي بن الحسين بن موسى بن بابويه
narrators.name_en: Muhammad b. 'Ali b. al-Husayn b. Musa b. Babawayh [al-Saduq]

narrators.ambiguity_note: Identified by name in al-Saduq's chains

narrators.name_ar: أبو سعيد الحسن بن علي العدوي
أحمد بن صالح بن سعيد المكي
narrators.name_en: Ahmad b. Salih b. Sa'id al-Makki

narrators.ambiguity_note: Common name; identified by chain context

narrators.known_identity: Abu Sa'id al-Khudri, prominent Companion of the Prophet

key_phrases.phrase_en: The Messenger of Allah made a wasiyya

similar_content_hints.description: Other versions of the Prophet's wasiyya to Imam Ali found across hadith collections with varying additional or fewer admonitions
Ethical and marital advice hadiths from the Prophet regarding family conduct and personal hygiene
